sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: TopTechReviews.org ("we", "us") publishes independent technology buyer guides at toptechreviews.org. This policy explains what information we collect and how we use it.

sections.heading: Information we collect
sections.body: When you visit our site, we may collect: pages viewed and referral source (via analytics tools such as Google Analytics, if enabled); click events when you follow outbound links to vendor sites (category, vendor name, destination URL, page path, timestamp); and technical data such as browser type and IP address stored with click logs on our hosting provider (Cloudflare).

sections.heading: How we use information
sections.body: We use this data to measure guide performance, improve editorial content, forward marketing click events to partner systems where configured, and maintain site security. We do not sell personal information.

sections.heading: Cookies and advertising
sections.body: We may use cookies for analytics and, if enabled, display advertising (e.g. Google AdSense or Carbon Ads). Third-party ad partners may use cookies to serve relevant ads. You can manage cookie preferences via our consent banner or your browser settings.

sections.heading: Third-party links
sections.body: Our guides link to external vendor websites. Those sites have their own privacy policies. Some outbound links are affiliate links — see our Affiliate Disclosure.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: Questions about this policy may be submitted via the Submit inquiry link on our homepage.
